Class GitHubPayloadBuilder

java.lang.Object
dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github.GitHubPayloadBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPayloadBuilder
public class GitHubPayloadBuilder extends Object implements IPayloadBuilder
Builds JSON payloads for creating GitHub issues via the repository_dispatch event.

This class is a singleton and provides a static build(Issue) method for convenience.

The payload includes:

  • Issue title
  • Issue body
  • Labels as a JSON array
Since:
0.2.0

    • buildPayload

      public String buildPayload(Issue issue)
      Description copied from interface: IPayloadBuilder
      Builds a provider-specific payload string for a given Issue.

      This payload is typically a JSON string or other format required by the issue tracking API.

      Specified by:
      buildPayload in interface IPayloadBuilder
      Parameters:
      issue - the issue to report
      Returns:
      the payload string suitable for submission to the provider
